description.value: Price 1,400 gp; Slot none; CL 7th; Weight 8 lbs.; Aura moderate evocation DESCRIPTION This stone tablet bears inscriptions detailing a notable being who fell short of achieving godhood. EFFECTS As a move action, the tabletâs holder can break it to release a remnant of latent divinity. The resultant burst of power imbues the user, granting a +1 morale bonus on attack rolls, weapon damage rolls, ability checks, skill checks, and saving throws for 1 minute. In addition, the user can attempt a new saving throw against one ongoing effect, such as a disease. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 700 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells commune, divine favor
